description_long: This is a thick, old-looking hardcover book with a dark, heavily worn cover that shows signs of age and use. The corners are reinforced with metallic-looking brackets, giving it a sturdy and somewhat mystical appearance. The cover is textured and mottled, with visible scuffs and faded patches, suggesting it has been handled frequently. The pages are tightly bound and appear to be made of standard white paper, visible along the sides. The book's cover features a single word in a stylized, weathered font, adding to its mysterious and arcane vibe. The overall design suggests it could be a spellbook or a tome of secrets, often found in fantasy or magical urban settings.
description: A thick, weathered hardcover book with metallic corner brackets and a dark, scuffed cover. The book exudes an old, mystical aura, with visible white pages and a single word in a stylized font on the front.
description_view_0: The front cover is visible, showing the word in a stylized font and two metallic corner brackets; the book's thickness and white pages are also apparent.
description_view_1: The book is seen from the side, highlighting the full length of the white page block and all four metallic corner brackets.
description_view_2: The back cover is visible with two metallic brackets, and the word on the front cover is partially readable in reverse orientation.
description_view_3: The book is viewed from the spine, which is plain and dark with no visible text or decoration; the cover's worn texture is prominent.
attribute_spine_design: The spine is plain and dark with a worn texture, lacking any visible text or decorative elements.
